description: Add ordered GitHub proxy fallback support to Scoop downloads
notes: Default proxy is 'https://gh-proxy.org'. Run 'scoop-github-proxy proxy add https://mirror.example.com' to add your own proxy.
This package requires git and depends on Scoop's git-based update path.
This package only supports Scoop's default downloader and will set 'aria2-enabled' to false.
Run 'scoop-github-proxy status' to verify patch and proxy status.
